title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 246.283 - Authority to cooperate with other entities to develop bike trails
text:
246.283.  Authority to cooperate with other entities to develop bike trails. — Any district formed pursuant to the laws of this state shall have authority to cooperate with other entities, public and private, in the development of bikeways and bike trails; provided, however, that no power of condemnation of land shall be used by the district for the purpose of bike trails.
(L. 1994 S.B. 633) 
Effective 7-12-94
